The '''''Liberator''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that saw service with the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Alliance Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="XWOSG">''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]''</ref>

==History==
During a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Battle in the Turkana system|operation]] with the objective of obtaining important information from the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Talon (Imperial corvette)|''Talon'']], the ''Liberator'', along with [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red]] and [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue]] [[Squadron/Legends|Squadrons]] engaged the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] running as escorts, while [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]] disabled the ''Talon''.<ref name="XWOSG" />

In that battle, [[Red Leader/Legends|Red Leader]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Hamo Blastwell]]'s X-wing was damaged and his [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was disabled, forcing him to dock with the ''Liberator'' to return to the [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="XWOSG" />

{{Ship-stub}}
